C:\Users\26236\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\apps\CLion\ch-0\222.4167.35\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Day1.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Day1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Day1.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW\bin\mingw32-g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Day1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Day1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDay1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Day1.dir\linklibs.rsp
